meaning: n.警察总长(印度和伊斯兰教各国高级警官),督军
examples: In a typical ploy, the nazim of the southern Punjabi city of Multan, Faisal Mukhtar, promised property rights to slum-dwellers in the city.
Nazim Richardson, Hopkins' long-time trainer, favorably compared Cloud's punching power to Antonio Tarver and Felix Trinidad.
